headline: ComEd Urges Customers to Act Now and Use Assistance and Energy Management Programs to Manage Bill Costs
summary: CHICAGO, April 02, 2026--Following one of the coldest winters on record in northern Illinois – with the National Weather Service reporting daily average temperatures below normal for approximately 55% of the season -- ComEd reminds customers that it has bill-assistance programs available to help manage energy costs.
